{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017391810F691AA84FDBA4AC375"}"},"total":647},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7378898803657360152","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我真的就挺喜欢这类型的而且作者写的一点都不拖沓男主有男主的性格女主女主的性格甚至连小配角都是非常鲜明然后活泼生动的那种真的很喜欢这本书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718035181,"group_id":"7185409628665023549","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N62RjyQSE98Z33pdBDE43z2H1FDaczzpFGRaaEE8m6LI","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7ab8573978504c5b872bf776b4898c4e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776536958&x-signature=1VBPRqWX6KTCQAar5BA4BNMRqM0%3D","user_id":"1640885716258947","user_name":"六月夜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1640885716258947","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7185409628665023549","book_info":{"abstract":"几年来，李翠花只专注一件事，相公在家就咒骂相公，相公不在就虐待孩子。
人人都说，她是个实打实的毒妇、疯子。
横插一脚的拂云表示，简直是无中生有、胡说八道！
不过疯子这个这马甲，她倒是很喜欢。
吵架时，一句“再说就去你家厨房拉屎”，让对手哑口无言。
打架时，一句“发起疯来我连自己都打”，让对手闻风而逃。
在拂云手里吃过亏的纷纷跑来告状：凌寒舟，你还管不管你媳妇了？
凌寒舟：她是疯子，我管不了。
后来，拂云才知，自己的马甲弱爆了！
